OverviewHistoryRewards

Event

Type

Game Systems

Group

Menus

Events are limited time activities in Genshin Impact that allows the player to earn rewards. Players must be Adventure Rank 5 to participate in Events, but most have additional requirements. Some Events include Quests that are not available after the Event duration has ended.

The Events Overview menu can be accessed from the Paimon Menu, from the Shortcut Wheel, from the icon in the top right of screen, or pressing the F5 key on PC.

Some Events allow the player to skip quests requirements using the Quick Start feature.

Contents

  • 1 List of Events
    • 1.1 Current
    • 1.2 Upcoming
    • 1.3 Permanent
  • 2 List of Event Types
  • 3 List of Recurring Events
  • 4 Navigation

List of Events[]

See Event/History for a complete list of Events.

Current

EventDurationType(s)

Whispers of Stars and Smoke Discount		July 01, 2026 – August 10, 2026In-Game, Discount

Sunny Summer		July 01, 2026 – August 10, 2026In-Game, Battle Pass

Sunny Summer Fontinalia		July 01, 2026 – August 11, 2026In-Game, Flagship

Raiment Collection: Mellow Warmth		July 01, 2026 – August 12, 2026In-Game, Miliastra Wonderland

When We Look Up at the Moon		July 01, 2026 – September 22, 2026In-Game, Exploration Mission

List of Event Types[]

There are 25 Event Types:

  • Animal Seeking Event
  • Anniversary Events
  • Battle Pass
  • Beetle Battle Event
  • Celebration Event
  • Challenge Event
  • Character Release Event
  • Co-Op Event
  • Collaboration Event
  • Discount Event
  • Expedition Event
  • Fanart Event
  • Flagship Event
  • Heated Battle Mode
  • In-Game Event
  • Kamera Event
  • Login Event
  • Mail Event
  • Memory Event
  • OST Review Event
  • Social Media Event
  • Submission Event
  • The Forge Realm's Temper
  • Trial Event
  • Web Event

List of Recurring Events[]

There are 65 Recurring Events:

  • "Childe" Tartaglia Fan Art Contest
  • "Fragrance in Thaw" Hu Tao Fan Art Contest
  • "Frolicking Flames" Yoimiya Fan Art Contest
  • "Frostflake Heron" Kamisato Ayaka Fan Art Contest
  • "Hanamizaka Heroics" Arataki Itto Fan Art Contest
  • "Pearl of Wisdom" Sangonomiya Kokomi Fan Art Contest
  • "Physic of Purity" Nahida Fan Art Contest
  • "Plane of Euthymia" Raiden Shogun Fan Art Contest
  • "Plenilune Gaze" Ganyu Fan Art Contest
  • "Scarlet Leaves Pursue Wild Waves" Kaedehara Kazuha Fan Art Contest
  • "Vago Mundo" Zhongli Fan Art Contest
  • "Valley Orchid" Yelan Fan Art Contest
  • "Vigilant Yaksha" Xiao Fan Art Contest
  • "Windborne Bard" Venti Fan Art Contest
